---
title: "Sandbox — Open in Colab button (internal)"
subtitle: "Not learner content. Proves the colab shortcode + the GPU-notebook CI policy."
search: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
**Internal scratch page** proving the `colab` shortcode and the GPU-notebook CI
policy (D0012). GPU/`colab` notebooks are **not** run in CI — they are manually
executed on Colab and the run is recorded in the PR (`docs/RUNBOOK.md`). The
button below links to the fixture notebook on GitHub via Colab.
:::

Authored with one line: {{</* colab infra/fixtures/colab-fixture.ipynb */>}}

{{< colab infra/fixtures/colab-fixture.ipynb >}}

The repository and branch in the link come from `_quarto.yml`
(`larnix-colab-repo` / `larnix-colab-branch`) — set them at publish time; they
are never hardcoded in the shortcode.
